title: NSF AI Education Act of 2025
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 33 - 0.
summary: This document outlines the National Science Foundation's policy for an AI-focused education initiative in the United States. The NSF AI Education Act of 2025 aims to provide funding and resources for education programs centered around artificial intelligence.

title: Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 35 - 0.
summary: The Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act is a policy aiming to safeguard consumers from false or misleading artificial intelligence-generated content and interactions. This act likely seeks to establish regulations and guidelines for AI usage to prevent harm and deception to individuals.

title: LIFT AI Act
action: Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 34 - 1.

title: CREATE AI Act of 2025
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 29 - 0.
summary: The CREATE AI Act of 2025 is a policy document focusing on creating and regulating AI technologies. The purpose of this act is likely to develop and establish guidelines for the development and use of Artificial Intelligence.

title: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 619.
summary: The Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act aims to create an environment that supports the development and use of artificial intelligence in financial services. Its purpose is to promote innovation while ensuring safety and efficiency in the financial sector.

title: Protecting Families from AI Data Center Energy Costs Act
action: Forwarded by Subcommittee to Full Committee (Amended) by Voice Vote.
summary: This policy aims to protect families from rising AI data center energy costs, but details are not available. It could potentially introduce regulations or protections to mitigate the financial impact of AI-driven energy consumption.

title: Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026
action: Referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026 is a policy aiming to address the potential environmental consequences of artificial intelligence. It focuses on regulating AI systems to minimize their negative effects on the environment.

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act is a policy aimed at halting the construction of new artificial intelligence data centers, potentially to address environmental concerns. The act's exact intentions and specific regulations are unknown due to the lack of a description in the provided information.

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on Foreign Affairs, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: This document proposes a ban on the development and operation of an artificial intelligence data center, effectively putting a temporary hold on further construction or expansion of such facilities. The goal of this moratorium is to reassess and potentially regulate the development and use of artificial intelligence data centers.

title: Voluntary Consumer AI Disclosure Pilot Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Voluntary Consumer AI Disclosure Pilot Act is a proposed policy that aims to increase transparency around artificial intelligence usage in consumer products. The policy would likely require companies to voluntarily disclose when their products use AI, giving consumers more understanding of the technology behind the products they use.

title: Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
summary: The Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026 aims to improve the lives of seniors through the development and use of artificial intelligence technology. This act may address issues such as elderly care, social isolation, and healthcare management using AI solutions.

title: SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Small Business and Entrepreneurship.
summary: This policy document outlines regulations for the use of artificial intelligence by the Small Business Administration (SBA) in the United States, aiming to govern its application in various operations and services. The SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026 likely establishes guidelines and standards for the responsible integration of AI technology within the organization.

title: To amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 to require the Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy to establish a prize competition program relating to artificial intelligence, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: This policy aims to modify the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 by adding a prize competition program for artificial intelligence research. The program is intended to support and promote advancements in AI technology.

title: Responsible Artificial Intelligence Defense Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Armed Services.
summary: The Responsible Artificial Intelligence Defense Act of 2026 is a policy aimed to establish guidelines for the development and use of artificial intelligence technologies. It likely focuses on balancing the benefits and risks of AI to ensure public safety and security.

title: Heat Emergency Assessment and Tracking using AI Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: The Heat Emergency Assessment and Tracking using AI Act aims to establish procedures for using AI technology to assess and track heat emergencies. This law seeks to mitigate the effects of heat-related incidents through the application of artificial intelligence.

title: To establish a pilot program for use by U.S. Customs and Border Protection at land ports of entry along the Arizona border to assess the use of artificial intelligence through an anomaly detection algorithm, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Homeland Security.
summary: This document proposes a pilot program for U.S. Customs and Border Protection to test the use of artificial intelligence at Arizona land ports of entry, focusing on anomaly detection algorithms. The program aims to assess the effectiveness of AI in this context for other unspecified purposes.

summary: This policy document, the Small AI Innovators Empowerment Act, aims to support and empower smaller AI-related businesses and innovators in their endeavors. The exact details of the policy are unclear, but its title suggests a focus on fostering growth and development within the smaller AI innovation sector.

title: Fraudulent Artificial Intelligence Regulations (FAIR) Elections Act of 2026

summary: The Fraudulent Artificial Intelligence Regulations (FAIR) Elections Act of 2026 is a policy aimed at preventing the use of fraudulent AI in election processes. It likely establishes guidelines and regulations to guarantee the integrity and security of elections by detecting and combating AI-driven voter manipulation.

summary: The China AI Power Report Act is a policy that likely regulates or affects the development and use of artificial intelligence in China, potentially involving laws and guidelines to promote or control its growth. However, without more information, the specifics of the policy are unknown.

summary: The Preventing AI Censorship Act is a law aimed at stopping AI systems from unfairly limiting online content. This bill likely seeks to protect freedom of expression and prevent algorithms from suppressing certain viewpoints or information.
